notes:
Launches fine. Played the tutorial and a couple of singleplayer maps. The game exits without any problems. Alt tabbing doesn't freeze the game either.

Performance is subpar though, I noticed it get under 60 a lot of times, and there are some minor stutters.  

Otherwise it's playable. Needs extensive testing though, since it could crash when doing a specific thing, but so far I had no problems in 30 minutes of playtime.
title: Takedown: Red Sabre

notes:
Seemingly fine. Game launches, gets into the menu. I changed the resolution to 1440p, high settings, and enabled vsync.

I can get in game and play just fine. No graphical glitches, crashes or freezes. 

Performance is subpar though. There's small microstutters, and while I didn't have an FPS meter, the FPS went under 60 depending on what I was looking at.

Otherwise, it's playable, I found zero issues with the graphics or audio.
No tweaks required whatsoever.
title: Takedown: Red Sabre

notes: not starting with all version of proton. borked
title: Takedown: Red Sabre
